__fixture_tag__: VENDORED SOURCE SNAPSHOT — frozen citation, not live data

claim.property: FCC / HCP atomic packing fraction (Kepler conjecture, proved)
claim.system: infinite arrangement of identical hard spheres in R^3
claim.condition: monodisperse spheres; lattice closest-packing FCC ≡ HCP at this density

source.primary: Hales T.C., 'A proof of the Kepler conjecture', Annals of Mathematics 162 (2005) 1065-1185
source.completion: Hales T.C. et al. (2017) 'A Formal Proof of the Kepler Conjecture', Forum Math. Pi 5, e2 — fully machine-verified
source.citation: Hales 2005 + Hales et al. 2017 formal proof — FCC/HCP packing density = pi / (3*sqrt(2)) ≈ 0.7405

tolerance.basis: exact value 0.74048... rounded to 4 sig figs; 0.7405 last-digit precision

spec_doc.line_hint: L11 row 'Atomic packing fraction | Physical / HARD | FCC/HCP: 0.7405 (Kepler conjecture, Hales 2017)'
